meta.title: Ownership Resale Convention Watchlist
meta.owner_decision: C4 resolved: pluggable resaleConvention, WMRHC default, owner confirms convention set.
meta.methodology: Screening-only resale convention set for deed-restricted and shared-equity ownership. Resale caps are compared with today's AMI-affordable price from HNAOwnershipNeed.maxAffordablePrice. Future AMI or CPI paths are not estimated.
meta.source_verification_note: Every convention must retain a verified HTTPS source_url. Parameters marked VERIFY are shown as requiring confirmation and must not be treated as final underwriting terms.

conventions.label: Fixed simple appreciation
conventions.calculation_note: Purchase price increases by the verified simple annual rate times years held.
conventions.screening_note: Default convention. Confirm deed-restriction terms, capital-improvement credits, and closing-cost treatment before underwriting.

conventions.label: Lesser of fixed cap or CPI
conventions.rate_label: VERIFY exact APCHA cap in current regulation PDF
conventions.calculation_note: Screening computation uses the fixed leg only as a conservative upper bound; realized cap may be lower if CPI is below the cap. No CPI path is estimated.
conventions.screening_note: Verify the governing deed restriction and current APCHA regulation before relying on a rate.

conventions.label: Shared-appreciation CLT
conventions.share_label: 25% homeowner share - VERIFY against primary land-lease or pricing document
conventions.calculation_note: Purchase price plus homeowner share of user-supplied or historical market appreciation, plus entered selling costs.
conventions.screening_note: Elevation's public page confirms a shared-equity resale formula; the 25% share needs primary document confirmation before underwriting.
